SI1.name: Instructional Clarity
SI1.description: Teacher clearly states the lesson goal

resources.title: 5 step lesson plan
resources.rationale: Root fix for vague or absent goals. If teacher cannot plan, they cannot state goals.

resources.title: Quick checks for understanding
resources.rationale: Once planning habit is forming, add quick checks to confirm students understand the goal.

resources.title: Blooms Taxonomy
resources.rationale: If SI1 still failing after planning + checks, teacher needs depth in goal-setting.

resources.title: 5 step lesson plan
resources.rationale: No lesson architecture = no flow. Start with basic planning structure.

resources.title: Using Varied Strategies to Build Understanding
resources.rationale: If flow is still poor after planning is solid, teacher needs variety in instructional strategies.

resources.title: Number Sense
resources.rationale: Number/operations errors — most common in mathematics content.

resources.title: Phonic strategies part 1
resources.rationale: Phonics errors — most common in literacy content.

resources.title: بھاری اور ہلکی آوازیں (Heavy and Light Sounds)
resources.rationale: Letter/sound errors — most common in Urdu language content.

PIC-1.name: Activities & Tasks Alignment
PIC-1.description: Activities match learning objectives and cognitive demands

resources.title: Learning Objectives & Task Design
resources.rationale: If tasks don't match objectives, lesson structure breaks. Foundation of coherent instruction.

resources.title: Cognitive Demand Levels (DOK)
resources.rationale: Tasks must match cognitive level needed for learning goal. Recall vs analysis vs synthesis.

resources.title: Task Sequencing & Scaffolding
resources.rationale: Structure task progression from simple to complex to maintain engagement and learning.

resources.title: Identifying Common Misconceptions
resources.rationale: Teachers must know subject-specific errors students make. Unaddressed, they compound.

resources.title: Correcting Misconceptions Effectively
resources.rationale: Direct correction without understanding causes frustration. Reteach with new approach.

PIC-4.name: Quality Questioning
PIC-4.description: Teacher uses open-ended and probing questions

resources.title: Bloom's Revised Taxonomy & Questioning Levels
resources.rationale: Not all questions are equal. Recall is necessary but not sufficient for deep learning.

resources.title: Wait Time & Think-Pair-Share
resources.rationale: Teachers often wait only 1 second. 3-5 seconds dramatically improves response quality.

PIA-3.name: Catering to Learning Levels
PIA-3.description: Teacher differentiates instruction for different student levels

resources.title: Differentiation Strategies Overview
resources.rationale: Without differentiation, struggling students fall behind and advanced students disengage. Highest equity impact.

resources.title: Verbal Differentiation in Whole-Class
resources.rationale: Different explanations for different groups during whole-class instruction without worksheets.

resources.title: Flexible Grouping & Adaptive Pacing
resources.rationale: Groups should change based on learning needs, not fixed. Pacing must match group readiness.

PIA-4.name: Responsive Re-explanation
PIA-4.description: Teacher explains differently when students don't understand

resources.title: Recognizing Confusion in Real Time
resources.rationale: Teachers must read confusion signals: blank looks, silence, wrong answers.

resources.title: Responsive Teaching: Changing Course
resources.rationale: When confusion is met with repetition, learning stalls. High-leverage skill: re-explain differently.

M1.name: Mathematical Discourse & Reasoning
M1.description: Students justify solutions and explain mathematical thinking

resources.title: Mathematical Reasoning vs Computation
resources.rationale: Justifying solutions is the core of mathematics. Without it, students are computing, not reasoning.

resources.title: Facilitating Mathematical Discourse
resources.rationale: Teacher must create safe space for students to explain and challenge reasoning.

resources.title: Phonics Foundations: Sound-Symbol Relationships
resources.rationale: Foundational literacy skill. Weak phonics has direct, lasting impact on reading ability.

resources.title: Systematic Phonics Instruction Sequences
resources.rationale: Phonics must follow logical sequence: consonants → short vowels → digraphs → blends → long vowels.

S1.name: Inquiry-Based Approach
S1.description: Teacher uses inquiry before explanation in science

resources.title: The 5E Instructional Model (Engage, Explore, Explain, Elaborate, Evaluate)
resources.rationale: Inquiry before explanation is the defining feature of science pedagogy. Absence reduces science to fact transmission.

resources.title: Facilitating Student Investigation & Questioning
resources.rationale: Students must form hypotheses and test them. Teacher facilitates discovery rather than telling.
